raw.message: 이것이 바로 포커의 찐 재미, 한게임 포커

hook.summary: Two popular Korean comedians excitedly unbox a branded poker set.
hook.visual_action: A man opens a black briefcase to reveal a poker set while his friend reacts with high energy.
hook.voiceover_transcript: 한게임에서 포커 세트를 보내주셨다! 한게임! 한게임 포커!

scene_flow: Influencers unbox a physical poker set gift from the game developer.
High-energy celebration transition into mobile poker gameplay.
Showcase of multiplayer poker matches with winning hands and card animations.
Final call to action featuring the influencers and the game logo.
cta_text: 같이 포커 한 판 어때? *지금 바로 플레이
audience_proxy: Korean men aged 20-45 who enjoy social card games and follow popular comedians.
